title: ArtKaroo presents exciting exhibition on 28 November
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - After a long intermission,...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - After a long intermission, ArtKaroo is reigniting its tradition of hosting exceptional exhibitions with an exciting event at the ArtHouse on 28 November.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - After a long intermission, ArtKaroo is reigniting its tradition of hosting exceptional exhibitions with an exciting event at the ArtHouse on 28 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This special evening will feature the collaborative works of renowned artists Dr Janet Dixon and Ina Marx, blending art andpsychology to present a deeply personal and thought-provoking collection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Titled Rolling Like a Pangolin, the exhibition showcases Dixon's introspective journey through her artistic thought processes,supported by contributions from fellow artists.","html":"Titled Rolling Like a Pangolin, the exhibition showcases Dixon's introspective journey through her artistic thought processes,
supported by contributions from fellow artists."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guests will be treated to an immersive experience as they follow the lights through ArtKaroo's lush, hidden garden to the ArtHouse, where the vibrant collection awaits. Adding to the ambiance, emerging local musician Timuno and the talented Joe Louis Marques will perform live, creating a harmonious blend of art and music. Guests are invited to wander through theexhibit, savor a glass of wine, and reconnect with fellow art lovers.","html":"Guests will be treated to an immersive experience as they follow the lights through ArtKaroo's lush, hidden garden to the ArtHouse, where the vibrant collection awaits. Adding to the ambiance, emerging local musician Timuno and the talented Joe Louis Marques will perform live, creating a harmonious blend of art and music. Guests are invited to wander through the
exhibit, savor a glass of wine, and reconnect with fellow art lovers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Exclusive opening night perks"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The exhibition will be held at the ArtHouse 237 Jan van Riebeeck Street, Oudtshoorn at 18:30. Art enthusiasts will enjoy a 10% discount on artwork purchases during the first two days of the exhibition.","html":"The exhibition will be held at the ArtHouse 237 Jan van Riebeeck Street, Oudtshoorn at 18:30. Art enthusiasts will enjoy a 10% discount on artwork purchases during the first two days of the exhibition."},{"type":"list","items":["Additionally, the collection will be available online starting 28 November, with early access provided to ArtKaroo’s emailsubscribers."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: ArtKaroo presents exciting exhibition on 28 November
